nasb.text: Those were the waters of Meribah, because the sons of Israel contended with the Lord, and He proved Himself holy among them.

esv.text: These are the waters of Meribah, where the people of Israel quarreled with the Lord, and through them he showed himself holy.

cnv.text: 這就是米利巴水，因為以色列人在那裡與耶和華爭鬧，耶和華在他們中間顯為聖。

ccb.text: 这地方叫米利巴泉，因为以色列人在那里埋怨耶和华，耶和华就向他们彰显了祂的圣洁。
